description: guest: pick one of three proposed slots

vars.utterance: The Wednesday morning option works for me.

metadata.expected_tone_notes: warm confirm; lock the slot; one short sentence

description: guest: ask to reschedule with a vague time reference

vars.utterance: Can we move the Tuesday slot to Wednesday morning?

description: guest: ask what the meeting is about (link landing)

vars.utterance: Hey, what's this meeting going to cover?

metadata.expected_tone_notes: warm, host-aware; references link topic if present; offers to schedule when ready

vars.utterance: None of those work — could we do Friday afternoon?

metadata.expected_tone_notes: acknowledge the counter; check availability; do not promise anything outside host's actual availability

vars.utterance: Sorry, I need to cancel — life got busy.

metadata.expected_tone_notes: graceful acceptance; offer to reschedule without pressure; one or two sentences
